targets.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "outdoor_temperature") |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "outdoor_humidity") |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["wind_speed", "wind_gust"])) |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "relative_pressure") |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "rain_rate") |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -15m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "uv_index") |> last() |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["outdoor_temperature", "indoor_temperature"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["outdoor_humidity", "indoor_humidity"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["wind_speed", "wind_gust"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "relative_pressure") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field =~ /battery/) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["uv_index", "solar_radiation"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "outdoor_temperature") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "station_reports"})) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])

import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "America/Chicago")
from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r.device_id != "synthetic-test" and r._field == "rain_daily") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start") |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "daily_precipitation"})) |> drop(columns: ["device_id", "handler", "source"])
